name: Five Nights at Horror Games
description: Welcome to Five Nights at Horror Games, a spine-chilling experience for thrill-seekers! Assume the role of a security guard in the eerie Haggy Lee Mansion Hospital, where strange sounds and suspicious creatures lurk. Keep a close eye on Huggy Lee and Granny Grandmother through surveillance cameras, conserving electricity to prevent their sinister advances. Navigate the labyrinthine hospital, feeling the adrenaline rush as you survive five terrifying nights. Website Developer <a href='https://www.bestcrazygames.com'>https://www.bestcrazygames.com</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: 1 Player, Action, Android, Horror, HTML5, iPad, iPhone, Mentolatux, Mobile, Unity3D
